channel.title: Forum menu style
channel.description:
Hello! :wave:
I have configured a first version of the menu links and I would like to know your opinion. I have set up two different styles for mobile and desktop, but they can be changed really easy. Here you have how it is actually on desktop and mobile.
![10|690x197,75%](upload://x1YWr9Rq0GSe25SYcycF6hiYzcD.png) ![36|318x499,50%](upload://ysoIwj9isQruM1unJTRBhNCbjAY.png)
Which option do you prefer? Text items as they are in desktop now or icon item as in mobile?
[poll type=regular results=always] * Desktop text items & Mobile text items * Desktop text items & Mobile icon items (Actual) * Desktop icon items & Mobile icon items * Desktop icon items & Mobile text items [/poll]
If you feel you need more examples just ask for them :grin: And if you want to change the names feel free to suggest anything! Maybe we should change Home, what do you think?

item.title: Forum menu style
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hello!

I have configured a first version of the menu links and I would like to know your opinion. I have set up two different styles for mobile and desktop, but they can be changed really easy. Here you have how it is actually on desktop and mobile.


Which option do you prefer? Text items as they are in desktop now or icon item as in mobile?

Click to view the poll.

If you feel you need more examples just ask for them And if you want to change the names feel free to suggest anything! Maybe we should change Home, what do you think?

Read full topic
